Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1068 0 0}Seems like you went digging for info, too, {f 4 1}-kun. You answered all my questions correctly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Here, you can have this! It's a little prize for keeping your promise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}See? I told you it wasn't a ghost story. There's no way they exist...[n]{f 1 1}
